sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72257" key="oi)keiotope/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰκειο-τοπέω</orth>, prob. <sense id="n72257.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">οἰκοδεσποτέω</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Doroth.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:3:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.34</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
